title: NBA Stats Predictor
subtitle: High-accuracy Machine Learning pipeline forecasting sports outcomes.
about:
What is the NBA Stats Predictor?

A data-science-first application that ingests massive live APIs to feed a Random Forest machine learning model capable of generating highly accurate game likelihood predictions.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Extremely noisy and vast data sources
challenge.description: Sports data is notoriously dense. Scraping, cleaning, and formatting player efficiency heuristics in real-time posed a massive infrastructure hurdle.

cards.title: Data Velocity
cards.description: Handling thousands of live stat updates concurrent with ongoing games.

cards.title: Noisy Metrics
cards.description: Filtering out irrelevant variables that caused overfitting in legacy models.

cards.title: Visualization Gap
cards.description: Raw JSON outputs were completely unreadable for standard end-users.

solution.title: Our Solution: Automated Data Extraction & ML Inference
solution.description: Built a fully autonomous pipeline from cron-based API retrievals directly into model inference, visualized by a clean frontend.

features.title: ETL Pipeline
features.description: Automated extraction and deep cleaning via Python/Pandas workflows.

features.title: Predictive Engines
features.description: Random forest model trained on decades of historic records parsing advanced team metrics.

features.title: Live Dashboards
features.description: Frontend visualization layer overlaying live active games with calculated confidence bands.

techStack.title: Our Tech-Stack: Python Ecosystem
techStack.description: Heavy reliance on industry-standard data science infrastructure.

categories.name: ML Architecture
categories.description: Scikit-Learn handling complex random-forest modeling and pipeline execution.

categories.name: Data Tier
categories.description: MySQL handling strongly-typed structured relational data for optimal ML ingestion speeds.

results.title: 85% Accuracy Target
results.description: Consistently forecasting outcomes correctly via aggressive algorithmic optimization.

results.title: Zero-Touch execution
results.description: Pipelines run fully automated without developer intervention.
